statements.sourceText: ch 1
make 6 sc
join to the first sc with a sl st

rounds.sourceText: Into a magic ring: ch 1, make 6 sc, join to the first sc with a sl st.
rounds.title: Round 1

statements.sourceText: Ch 2 (doesn't count as a st)

operation.instruction: Make 5 dc in the indicated st/sp. Remove your hook from the last dc and insert it into the first dc of the 5-dc group. Grab the last st with your hook and pull it through the first st to complete the Popcorn.
operation.target: same st as the sl st join

statements.sourceText: Make a Popcorn in the same st as the sl st join

body.sourceText: (Ch 2, make a Popcorn in the next st)

statements.sourceText: Ch 2

operation.instruction: Make 5 dc in the indicated st/sp. Remove your hook from the last dc and insert it into the first dc of the 5-dc group. Grab the last st with your hook and pull it through the first st to complete the Popcorn.

statements.sourceText: make a Popcorn in the next st
(Ch 2, make a Popcorn in the next st) 5 times
Ch 2
join to the top of the first Popcorn with a sl st

rounds.sourceText: Ch 2 (doesn't count as a st). Make a Popcorn in the same st as the sl st join. (Ch 2, make a Popcorn in the next st) 5 times. Ch 2, join to the top of the first Popcorn with a sl st.
rounds.title: Round 2

statements.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st)

body.sourceText: FPhdc around the Popcorn, [hdc, 2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp

operation.instruction: Front post half-double crochet around the Popcorn

hdc in the next ch-2 sp
2 dc in the next ch-2 sp
ch 2 in the next ch-2 sp
2 dc in the next ch-2 sp
hdc in the next ch-2 sp
(FPhdc around the Popcorn, [hdc, 2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp) 6 times
Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st

rounds.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). (FPhdc around the Popcorn, [hdc, 2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp) 6 times. Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st.
rounds.title: Round 3

body.sourceText: (FPhdc around the FPhdc, ch 4, make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp, ch 4)

statements.sourceText: FPhdc around the FPhdc
ch 4

operation.instruction: Make 5 dc in the indicated st/sp. Remove your hook from the last dc and insert it into the first dc of the 5-dc group. Grab the last st with your hook and pull it through the first st to complete the Popcorn.

statements.sourceText: make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp
ch 4
(FPhdc around the FPhdc, ch 4, make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp, ch 4) 6 times
Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st.

rounds.sourceText: (FPhdc around the FPhdc, ch 4, make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp, ch 4) 6 times. Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st.
rounds.title: Round 4

body.sourceText: start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round

operation.note: This counts as your first FPdc.

statements.sourceText: start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round

body.sourceText: FPsc around the FPhdc, ch 1. Inserting your hook from top to bottom into the FLO of the FPsc you just made, make a sc. Mark the top of this sc with s SM.This counts as your first (fake) FPdc.

statements.sourceText: FPsc around the FPhdc
ch 1

operation.target: FLO of the FPsc you just made

statements.sourceText: Inserting your hook from top to bottom into the FLO of the FPsc you just made, make a sc
Mark the top of this sc with s SM

note.message: This counts as your first (fake) FPdc
note.sourceText: This counts as your first (fake) FPdc

statements.sourceText: This counts as your first (fake) FPdc

conditional.question: Are you using a different colour for this round?

statements.sourceText: If you are using a different colour for this round, you can start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round. If you are using the same colour for this round, we are going to start the round with a 'fake' FPdc as follows: FPsc around the FPhdc, ch 1. Inserting your hook from top to bottom into the FLO of the FPsc you just made, make a sc. Mark the top of this sc with s SM.This counts as your first (fake) FPdc.

body.sourceText: (Ch 3, FPsc around the next Popcorn, ch 3, FPdc around the next FPhdc)

statements.sourceText: Ch 3
FPsc around the next Popcorn
ch 3
FPdc around the next FPhdc

repeat.normalizationNote: Original repeat count was 6, but the final iteration differs (omits the last FPdc). Normalized to a homogeneous repeat of 5 plus the final iteration flattened below.

statements.sourceText: (Ch 3, FPsc around the next Popcorn, ch 3, FPdc around the next FPhdc) 6 times, omitting the last FPdc on the last repeat
Ch 3
FPsc around the next Popcorn
ch 3
Join to the top of the first FPdc with a sl st
remove the SM

conditional.question: Did you use a stitch marker?

statements.sourceText: remove the SM if you used one

rounds.sourceText: If you are using a different colour for this round, you can start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round. If you are using the same colour for this round, we are going to start the round with a 'fake' FPdc as follows: FPsc around the FPhdc, ch 1. Inserting your hook from top to bottom into the FLO of the FPsc you just made, make a sc. Mark the top of this sc with s SM.This counts as your first (fake) FPdc. (Ch 3, FPsc around the next Popcorn, ch 3, FPdc around the next FPhdc) 6 times, omitting the last FPdc on the last repeat. Join to the top of the first FPdc with a sl st and remove the SM if you used one.

Mark the last ch-2 sp with a SM
Join to the first FPdc with a sl st
Fasten off and work away your ends

rounds.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). (FPdc around the next st from Round 5, skip the first st of the next Petal from Round 6 and hdc in the next 2 sts. operation.instruction: Extended double crochet (Yarn over, insert your hook into the indicated st, yarn over and pull up a loop. Yarn over and pull through ONE loop. (Yarn over and pull through two loops) twice.)

ch 2

operation.instruction: Extended double crochet (Yarn over, insert your hook into the indicated st, yarn over and pull up a loop. Yarn over and pull through ONE loop. (Yarn over and pull through two loops) twice.)

2 dc in the next ch-6 sp

Fasten off and work away your ends
